overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through Night City. The journey transitions from an enclosed glass skybridge through an indoor garden atrium to bustling neon-lit streets and finally beneath an elevated highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed glass pedestrian skybridge with neon floor signage

events.description: approaching automatic glass doors at the end of the skybridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a modern glass-enclosed skybridge with glowing cyan text on the floor

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass panels forming the walls of the elevated walkway
glowing cyan neon text embedded in the reflective floor reading NIGHT CITY
glass automatic sliding doors at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a sleek, modern glass skybridge with reflective floors and glowing cyan neon text. The camera moves forward through the enclosed walkway toward automatic doors at the far end, with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor garden atrium with descending staircase and glass walls

events.description: passing through automatic doors into indoor garden atrium with trees
beginning descent down stairs or ramp in the atrium

agents.ego_description: walking through automatic doors and descending stairs in an indoor atrium with large trees and bamboo plants

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead through the atrium toward the street exit

entered.detail: large mature trees growing inside the atrium space
tall bamboo stalks in planters near the exit
metal handrails along the descending staircase

segments.scene_description: Passing through automatic doors into a bright indoor atrium filled with trees and natural light streaming through glass walls. The camera descends a staircase following another pedestrian, with bamboo plants visible near the lower level exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with food stalls and seating umbrellas

events.description: exiting building into open-air plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating
passing pink neon-lit food stall, ambient lighting shifts to magenta

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor plaza past dining areas with white umbrellas and a prominent pink neon food stall

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table under white umbrella

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright pink neon lighting and menu displays
large white patio umbrellas over outdoor dining tables
large digital advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the building into an open plaza filled with outdoor dining tables under white umbrellas. A distinctive pink neon food stall glows on the right as the camera walks past seated patrons toward the city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city sidewalk beneath elevated highway with traffic and digital billboards

events.description: vehicles passing on the road to the right, headlights visible
slight left turn to follow the curving sidewalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk next to moderate traffic, passing various pedestrians and beneath large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street with headlights on
pedestrian walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure spanning above the street
giant digital advertising screens displaying animated content on building sides
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling city sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with futuristic vehicles passing on the right. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene while pedestrians walk in both directions under the massive concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway with fluorescent tunnel lighting

events.description: entering deep shadow under elevated highway, ambient light drops to artificial fluorescent only
approaching darker tunnel section with wall-mounted digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway through the dimly lit underpass with fluorescent lighting

entered.detail: underside of the elevated highway forming a concrete ceiling over the street
linear fluorescent tube lights mounted under the highway structure
digital advertising screens mounted on the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deep under the elevated highway into a covered underpass illuminated by linear fluorescent lights. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with digital screens on the walls and sparse traffic passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, enclosed skybridge into the vibrant, sprawling urban density of Night City. It begins within a sleek glass walkway characterized by reflective floors and cyan neon text, moving forward until automatic doors open into a bright, sunlit atrium filled with trees. As the camera descends a staircase past bamboo plants, the scene expands into an open plaza where white umbrellas and a glowing pink food stall mark the transition to the outdoors. The movement then carries the viewer onto a bustling sidewalk beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, surrounded by digital billboards and flowing futuristic traffic. Finally, the environment shifts from the open city air into a dark, enclosed underpass illuminated by linear fluorescent lights and wall-mounted digital screens.
